questionHtml: The reaction of lithium with water is a redox reaction. Identify the oxidizing agent in the reaction giving a reason.
markschemeHtml:
H2O AND hydrogen gains electrons «to form H2»

OR

H2O AND H oxidation state changed from +1 to 0 ✔

 

Accept “H2O AND H/H2O is reduced”.

meta.title: The reaction of lithium with water is a redox reaction. Identify the oxidizing agent in the reaction giving a reason.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter
Structure 1.4—Counting particles by mass: The mole
Structure 1.4.3—Molar mass M has the units g mol–1. Solve problems involving the relationships between the number of particles, the amount of substance in moles and the mass in grams.
